competitions.title: The THRILL OF VICTORY, especially when you do what they say can’t be done! #armwrestling #worldchamp
The Eliza Cup 2026
competitions.summary:
GUWAHATI, ASSAM! ARE YOU READY?
THE WORLD IS COMING!

Eliza Cup explodes onto the scene this weekend on the 5th of July and brings professional armwrestling to India like never before.

Featuring many World Champions against India’s best, and one of the greatest armwrestlers of all time — Cvetan Gashevski in an elite supermatch series.

Plus, of course, there is the coveted Eliza Cup itself — to be fought for and won by the strongest man and strongest woman in the Open Pro tournament.

With a game-changing 13 Lac prizemoney and world-class production, July 5th is going to be not only the best tournament India has ever seen, but it will turn the heads of the very best everywhere around the world.

DO NOT MISS THIS!

REGISTRATIONS CLOSE SOON.

NO EXCEPTIONS

GATES ARE CLOSED

www.poundforpoundarmwrestling.com
